message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml SignUp Flow

actor "Client" as Client
participant "Mobile" as Mobile
participant "SMS Gateway" as SMSGateway
participant "Push Gateway" as PushGateway
database "DigitalDB" as DigitalDB
participant "Keycloak + Extension" as Keycloak

== Initial Sign-Up ==
Client -> Mobile: 1 Enter PhoneNumber, Birthday
Client -> Mobile: 2 Enter Password
Mobile -> Keycloak: 3 POST /auth/signup (PhoneNumber, Birthday)
activate Keycloak
    Keycloak -> DigitalDB: 4 findClientRecord(PhoneNumber, Birthday): ClientRecord
    activate DigitalDB
    DigitalDB --> Keycloak: 5 ClientRecord
    deactivate DigitalDB
    
    alt [ClientRecord is NOT found]
        Keycloak --> Mobile: 6 HTTP 202
    end
    
    Keycloak -> Keycloak: 7 saveInOTPContext(ClientRecord.id)
    Keycloak -> Keycloak: 8 generateAndSaveOTP(): OTP
    Keycloak --> Mobile: 9 HTTP 202
    Keycloak -> SMSGateway: 10 sendSMS(phone=PhoneNumber, data=OTP)
    activate SMSGateway
    SMSGateway --> Mobile: 11 SMS with OTP
    deactivate SMSGateway
deactivate Keycloak

== Preparing for Completion ==
Mobile -> PushGateway: 12 getPushToken(): Push Token
activate PushGateway
PushGateway --> Mobile: 13 Push Token
deactivate PushGateway
Mobile -> Mobile: 14 generateKeys(): [PublicKey, PrivateKey]

== Completing Sign-Up ==
Client -> Mobile: 15 Enter OTP
Mobile -> Keycloak: 16 POST /auth/signup/complete (OTP, Password, Push Token, PublicKey)
activate Keycloak
    Keycloak -> Keycloak: 17 validateOTP(OTP)
    Keycloak -> DigitalDB: 18 updateUser(ClientId, KeycloakUserId)
    activate DigitalDB
    DigitalDB --> Keycloak: 19
    deactivate DigitalDB
    
    Keycloak -> DigitalDB: 20 createMobileDevice(ClientId, Push Token, PublicKey)
    activate DigitalDB
    DigitalDB --> Keycloak: 21
    deactivate DigitalDB
    
    Keycloak -> Keycloak: 22 generateJWT(scope="regular_user"): JWT
    Keycloak --> Mobile: 23 HTTP 200 {jwt: JWT}
deactivate Keycloak

@enduml
```
